title: Video Background Remover
upload_title: Click or drag video file here
preview_first_frame: First Frame Preview (Click to Pick Color)
preview_wand_frame: First Frame Preview (Click to Select Area)
preview_perframe: Current Frame Preview (Click to Select Area)
preview_hybrid: First Frame Preview (Click based on operation)
preview_hybrid_chroma: First Frame Preview (Click to Pick Color)
preview_hybrid_wand: First Frame Preview (Click to Select Area)
chroma_color_empty: Click the left image to pick colors, or enter manually
alert_invalid_color: Please enter a valid color value (e.g., #00ff00)
confirm_clear_all_colors: Are you sure you want to clear all colors?
wand_hint: Click the left image to select areas to remove. Multiple clicks add more areas.
perframe_hint: Click the left image to select areas to remove for current frame. Each frame can have different selections.
perframe_copy_range_label: Copy current frame selection to frame range:
alert_no_perframe_selection: Please add selections to frames first
confirm_clear_all: Are you sure you want to clear all frame selections?
hybrid_hint: Hybrid Mode: Add chroma key or magic wand operations in order, processed sequentially
hybrid_operation_empty: No operations yet. Click buttons below to add
hybrid_pick_color_hint: Click the left image to pick a color
hybrid_wand_hint: Click the left image to select areas to remove
confirm_clear_all_hybrid: Are you sure you want to clear all operations?
alert_no_hybrid_operation: Please add at least one operation first
format_webm_vp8: WebM VP8 (Good Compatibility, Supports Alpha & Audio)
keep_audio_not_supported: Current format does not support audio
alert_no_color: Please select background colors to remove first
alert_no_wand_selection: Please click the image to select areas to remove
png_zip_hint: Please add JSZip library to support batch PNG sequence export. Only the first frame was exported.
gif_lib_hint: GIF library not loaded. Exporting as WebM instead. Add gif.js library for GIF support.
alert_decode_failed: This browser cannot decode the video file. Try a more common codec (e.g., H.264) or transcode with ffmpeg.
error_frames_too_many: Too many frames ({count}). Please lower FPS or shorten the video duration.
error_raw_frame_invalid: RAW frame data length is invalid: {actual} < {expected}
